steps.title: Look for mixed feelings
steps.content: The claim says the narrator has mixed feelings about her surroundings. The strongest quotation must include both a positive reaction and a negative reaction, not just dislike or visual description.

steps.title: Separate emotion from description
steps.content: A and D are only negative descriptions of the wallpaper. B describes how the wallpaper looks different by moonlight, but it does not show conflicting feelings. The quotation about being fond of the room except for the horrid wallpaper includes both approval and dislike. The answer is C.
